request.prompt:
Use case: cinematic support footage for the reserve quadrant in a narrated CRE strategy video
Primary request: a quiet office overlooking the city at blue hour, with an unopened acquisition binder, keys, and cash reserve materials arranged neatly on a desk
Scene/background: upper-floor office at blue hour, calm skyline outside, no urgency in the room
Subject: clean desk, unopened binder, keys, reserve cash box, neatly stacked folders
Action: city lights brighten slowly while a soft breeze nudges a page edge
Camera: slow dolly-out, 50mm, composed and patient
Lighting/mood: cool blue-hour ambient light with warm desk practicals, calm and selective
Color palette: deep teal, charcoal, cool blue, warm amber, brushed brass
Style/format: filmic, natural grain, premium and disciplined
Timing/beats: twelve-second calm reveal with no sharp transitions
Constraints: no logos, no text, no people, no readable labels
Avoid: jitter; flicker; readable text; messy desk clutter; surreal skyline
